channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs see 9-day inflow streak as investors show resilience
item.description: US spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $2.12 billion in inflows over nine days, signaling growing conviction among investors.

item.title: Ripple-linked XRP stalls near $1.44 as 'triangle squeeze' nears breakout
item.description: Price holds in tight range after high-volume move, with compression signaling a decisive move as institutional demand quietly builds.

item.title: Hyperliquid whale holds $38M short against Bitcoin, but does it matter?
item.description: A Hyperliquid whale holds large short positions against Bitcoin and several altcoins. Does the position provide any signal on the markets’ future outcomes?

item.title: US authorities freeze $344M in crypto linked to Iran
item.description: The announced crypto freeze came just one day after Tether said it had frozen $344 million of its USDt stablecoin in response to a request from US law enforcement.

item.title: U.S. CFTC adds New York to string of states its suing to stop prediction market pushback
item.description: The federal regulator has been suing states that seek to curtail prediction markets activity and claim it should be deemed state-regulated gaming.

item.title: Bitcoin developer Paul Sztorc announces BTC hard fork called eCash
item.description: The hard fork will introduce a new, competing layer-1 blockchain and seven layer-2 scaling networks, according to Sztorc's announcement.

item.title: Brazil Issues Sweeping Ban Against Prediction Market Platforms
item.description: Brazil’s Finance Ministry cited investor protection concerns and rising gambling addiction as it blocked platforms like Polymarket and Kalshi.

item.title: Top memecoin holders expected to attend Trump luncheon
item.description: The US President has confirmed his attendance for the Florida event, but it's unclear whether Tron founder Justin Sun, suing the Trump family's crypto business, will appear.

item.title: ⚡️QUANTUM COMPUTER BREAKS ECC KEY IN BITCOIN-RELATED TEST A researcher used public quantum hardware to break a 15-bit elliptic curve key, winning Project Eleven’s 1 BTC Q-Day Prize. The test does not threaten Bitcoin’s 256-bit security yet, - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE43OFlnNVhyM3Nya0xFZDVHYS03ZlR0SFcwcUlXNV9NUldCM2VlZVNuLUZ1d0J6VnliZDhtazZmcUlpSC1MVFRsRWx3Wjg4akZsSW5Zc2pLbVZzTjBvTjBvbw?oc=5" target="_blank">⚡️QUANTUM COMPUTER BREAKS ECC KEY IN…

item.title: Bitcoin is on track for its best month in a year. $5 billion USDT growth fuels the rebound
item.description: Strong earnings season trumps geopolitical risks for now, one trader said, as equities and crypto markets "stopped caring" about Iran war headlines.

item.title: Tennessee Becomes Second State to Outlaw Bitcoin, Crypto ATMs
item.description: Tennessee has become the second U.S. state to outlaw Bitcoin and crypto ATMs, making it a criminal offense to own or operate the machines.

item.title: Aurelion allocates $48M in tokenized gold to newly launched yield protocol
item.description: The XAUE protocol lets holders earn yield on tokenized gold through lending and trading strategies while maintaining exposure to the underlying asset.

item.title: Trump DOJ Backs Elon Musk's xAI in Fight Over Colorado AI Bias Law
item.description: The Justice Department moved to intervene in xAI’s lawsuit challenging Colorado’s algorithmic discrimination law.

item.title: South Korea Arrests Man for a Fake AI Wolf Photo That Raised Alarms
item.description: A man created an AI-generated image of escaped wolf Neukgu "for fun." It fooled authorities, triggered emergency alerts, and derailed a nine-day search operation.

item.title: Tether's $344 million USDT freeze linked to U.S. 'Economic Fury' against Iran regime
item.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the U.S. is seeking to choke off "all financial lifelines" for the regime.

item.title: U.S. Government Unveils Sweeping Enforcement Actions Against Southeast Asian Scam Centers and Crypto Fraud Networks
item.description: TL;DR In a massive coordinated interagency effort, the Department of Justice (DOJ), the Department of the Treasury’s Office of Foreign… The post U.S. Government Unveils Sweeping Enforcement Actions Against Southeast Asian Scam Centers and …

item.title: 41 kidnappings of crypto holders in France in 3.5 months of 2026. Why? 🥖 French tax officials selling crypto owners' data to criminals (Ghalia C.) + massive tax database leaks. Now the state also wants IDs and private messages of social media users. More dat - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiWkFVX3lxTE9nLUwzWS1NVmhCSnFzcjdtWVBqU3hZVkdfWl9PVEl2RE5MemR6UmhMZzZWQ0VUZDFmemI3dmZMSkdkWm10ejZyNlc0TWY0Y0V4eVEyeTNodDU2dw?oc=5" target="_blank">41 kidnappings of crypto holders in France i…

item.title: Anthropic Rolls Out Election Safeguards for Claude AI Ahead of US Midterms
item.description: Claude maker Anthropic reported that its latest AI models scored 95-96% on political neutrality tests ahead of the 2026 midterms.

item.title: Quantum computer breaks 15-bit elliptic curve cryptographic key
item.description: The Bitcoin community continues to debate whether cryptographically relevant quantum computers are imminent or decades away.

item.title: EU’s 20th Russia Sanctions Package Signals a New Era of Crypto-Specific Enforcement
item.description: TL;DR The EU’s 20th Russia sanctions package introduces a total sectoral ban on Russia-based crypto service providers and decentralized platforms,… The post EU’s 20th Russia Sanctions Package Signals a New Era of Crypto-Specific Enforcemen…

item.title: Justice Department Ends Probe of Fed Chair Powell, Clearing Path for Warsh Confirmation
item.description: The Justice Department closed the Jerome Powell probe, removing a barrier to Senate action on Kevin Warsh's Federal Reserve nomination.

item.title: Crypto PAC Fellowship halts support of Texas AG for Senate: Report
item.description: After reporting more than $1.7 million to election officials, a crypto-aligned political action committee has reportedly backed out of advertising for a Texas Senate candidate.

item.title: Bitcoin’s rally may be stronger than it looks, not just driven by leverage, but by real demand amidst tightening supply. Key Takeaways: • Rising ETF inflows are near their highest levels this year, signaling stronger institutional demand • Accumulation by long-ter - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBOSnNpS3d2ZHNKVDdQQXZldnlWdVdWYklQdUxyQ09aREhxMGhMS043RDI3Zl9uVHRsNzdBdk9zSEY3enZfRjJRd2VHVF9neVlqbEZsWFNGSWZUTVl4ZTlxVlpoWE0?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin’s rally may be stronger…

item.title: DeepSeek V4 Is Here—Its Pro Version Costs 98% Less Than GPT 5.5 Pro
item.description: The Chinese lab that shook Wall Street just dropped its biggest, most efficient model yet, hours after OpenAI launched GPT-5.5.

item.title: Amazon Web Services Marketplace Adds Chainlink Crypto Oracle Services
item.description: Amazon’s Chainlink integration lets enterprises connect cloud infrastructure with blockchain networks through familiar AWS tools.

item.title: Crypto Biz: Same players, bigger bets as crypto eyes a rebound
item.description: Familiar players ramp up Bitcoin and Ether bets as markets hint at a rebound, while institutions test blockchain rails and US lawmakers stall on crypto rules this week.

item.title: US Soldier Was Blocked on Kalshi Before Taking Maduro Bets to Polymarket
item.description: A U.S. soldier charged with using classified military intelligence to bet on Polymarket failed to pass Kalshi's KYC procedures.

item.title: Sen. Bernie Sanders criticized the Trump family on Thursday over reported profits tied to cryptocurrency and other business deals, calling it “unprecedented kleptocracy.” Sanders pointed to a New Yorker report estimating that President Donald Trump and his f - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE9EZFV4TmlKVk90QVdFN0JOWm8xRWRGc0h6RDF3TmVZdkNIY3QzSm81VVJ2aTNEOXFMQ0FjM0dSUXJiY0ZqN2ZZdkpvU2Itbm1oR2RlMEpTNjVWRHp3WHc?oc=5" target="_blank">Sen. Bernie Sanders criticized the Trum…

item.title: Bitcoin stays 'stalled' at $78K as oil threatens new risk-asset squeeze
item.description: Bitcoin and risk assets faced an uphill struggle after the S&P 500 hit new all-time highs as analysis warned that BTC price support was at risk.

item.title: Trump's DOJ drops probe that stood in way of president's pick to run Federal Reserve
item.description: The Justice Department passed an investigation of Fed Chair Jerome Powell to the Fed's own inspector, which could clear a confirmation path for Kevin Warsh.

item.title: Solana confirms a bullish signal, which last sparked 100% SOL price gains
item.description: A bullish signal from Solana’s MACD indicator hinted at a potential rally, though resistance at $90 could delay the recovery.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Morgan Stanley Targets BlackRock With Money Market Fund for Stablecoin Issuers
item.description: Morgan Stanley debuted a money market fund intended for stablecoin issuers, billing the product as a way for companies to manage reserves.

item.title: TRUMP ADMIN. FREEZES $344 MLN IN CRYPTO OVER LINKS TO IRAN - CNN - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE81anh1U3dTY2lwTGpEMjBTSUJ2dFl5UGZNdUZOaHdra2JTaDBtb3FSS1pGUkxEN094NjRZMEUzZnZ2ZE9XZWY2UEw4S1NjMlV5MjNsbElLZkhhbEpTYkE?oc=5" target="_blank">TRUMP ADMIN. FREEZES $344 MLN IN CRYPTO…

item.title: Nakamoto taps Bitwise and Kraken for Bitcoin options strategy to hedge risk
item.description: Nakamoto launched a Bitcoin derivatives program with Bitwise and Kraken, aiming to generate options premiums and hedge part of its BTC treasury exposure.

item.title: Jane Street asks court to reject Terraform claims tied to UST-LUNA crash
item.description: A filing Thursday said the lawsuit rehashes events already settled in court and seeks damages for losses caused by internal misconduct.

item.title: Tom Lee's BitMine Buys Another $23 Million in ETH From Ethereum Foundation
item.description: Top Ethereum treasury firm BitMine Immersion Technologies made its second ETH buy from the Ethereum Foundation.

item.title: Bitmine to buy 10,000 ether for $23.9 million from the Ethereum Foundation
item.description: The transaction brings the firm’s holdings closer to its 5% of ETH target.

item.title: JUST IN: BlackRock's spot bitcoin ETF has bought 18,180 BTC worth $1.4 BILLION over the last week 🤯 Demand is increasing, supply is decreasing 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9HanY2Zi1lbThiWVdYYUJnYXBZeldlb2NSRTZnQTk1eFMxUnVCOGN6NnF5eThsRmxRdmszQjFjekZtaEJDV3lnSERwaEF1NUYxSEQ3SEZvdGFiSGtyLVFzUGhiNThYME0?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: BlackRock's spot b…

item.title: Wisconsin Sues Prediction Markets Over Sports Betting Contracts
item.description: The state alleges sports betting products on Kalshi, Polymarket and other financial platforms violate Wisconsin gambling laws.

item.title: Bitcoin 'Q-Day' Draws Nearer as Quantum Researcher Breaks Simplified Key
item.description: Project Eleven awarded 1 BTC to an Italian researcher after a public quantum computer breaks a 15-bit elliptic curve key, the largest public demonstration of its kind to date.

item.title: South Africa draft bill would tighten crypto capital controls
item.description: South Africa’s draft capital flow rules would bring crypto under exchange controls, with declaration duties, transaction limits and tougher penalties.

item.title: Researcher wins 1 bitcoin bounty for 'largest quantum attack' on underlying tech
item.description: Independent researcher Giancarlo Lelli broke a 15-bit elliptic curve key on publicly accessible quantum hardware, 512 times larger than the previous public demonstration in September 2025.

item.title: Strategy stock beats Bitcoin after rising 25% in a month: BTC bottom in?
item.description: Historically, MSTR’s outperformance signals traders are taking more risk, betting Bitcoin’s worst drawdown phase may be over.

item.title: 0/ Today, the Ethereum Foundation finalized the terms of a 10,000 ETH sale at an average price of $2,387 via OTC. For this sale, our OTC counterparts was @BitMNR. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBhb2ludlRfelNFSnJtUXlELS1iZWYwbEhraFk3dWktUUdzQ1lYTVlDUGtiWFZIdjZkUlgxTUNJaU1OcFBvVDFsX3pUaWpCRl85U18ydzV4R2NaUlZOc0lacS1HRQ?oc=5" target="_blank">0/ Today, the Ethereum Foundatio…

item.title: China’s new online marketing rules tighten ban on crypto promotions
item.description: China’s new online marketing rules tighten an already sweeping crypto ban and place fresh pressure on financial influencers, echoing parallel crackdowns in Europe, Australia and the UK.

item.title: ECB signs standards deals to cut digital euro integration costs
item.description: The ECB signed deals with three standards bodies to reuse open payment standards for the digital euro and lower integration costs for banks and merchants.

item.title: SpaceX's $75 billion IPO could drain the liquidity that's helping lift bitcoin and crypto
item.description: SpaceX, OpenAI and Anthropic are set to raise more than $240 billion combined from June through year-end, a capital pull larger than every venture-backed US IPO since 2000 combined, and crypto sits in the same liquidity pool.

item.title: Meta Agrees to Deploy Millions of Amazon AI Chips in Deal Worth Billions
item.description: Facebook parent company Meta has agreed to a multi-year deal to use Amazon’s AI chips in a deal that AWS says is worth billions of dollars.

item.title: Zondacrypto CEO goes off radar as Poland probe deepens
item.description: Polish prosecutors are investigating Zondacrypto over alleged fraud and fund access issues, while local media report that CEO Przemysław Kral is in Israel.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Aptos (APT) gains 3.5%, leading index higher
item.description: Aave (AAVE), up 3.2% from Thursday, was also a top performer.

item.title: NEW: South Africa's National Treasury proposes draft regulations requiring crypto holders to declare assets above a set threshold and hand over private keys to enforcement officers on demand, carrying fines and up to five years in prison for non-compliance. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE1UWnpqUG9Vd3lZbkVETktRamFlc0V0MXZ5WTRyTzZRck9vZTd5Zm5TYl9NZ2lybjBPNUdvWnk5Ymk3NzZpRFl1anFCSXNQeGlXVVVRWlFXdndfWDhKZUE?oc=5" target="_blank">NEW: South Africa's National Treasury p…

item.title: Wisconsin sues Kalshi, Polymarket, others over sports event contracts
item.description: Wisconsin’s lawsuit against Kalshi, Robinhood, Coinbase, Polymarket and Crypto.com deepens the battle between state gambling enforcers and federal regulators over sports prediction markets.

item.title: Kazakhstan is bringing crypto into everyday transactions! Binance Kazakhstan and Alatau City Bank introduced a live crypto payment flow - presented directly to the President of Kazakhstan. A simple use case: pay with digital assets, settle instantly in local curr - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE0tckNNNVNIb1B1NGpuelVXWDA0YkFwV3E5MW1VYjBiTzJhTk5Nbkt2UlF1ZzJTMXExR3BQdUFCUGdwZjZSaGZOOTVTSEtqMVRFM3hONFJpOWt4SXAx?oc=5" target="_blank">Kazakhstan is bringing crypto into everyda…

item.title: XRP price risks 40% decline versus Bitcoin despite 9-day ETF inflow streak
item.description: Spot XRP ETFs record net inflows for nine consecutive days, absorbing sell pressure and potentially supporting XRP price recovery over time.

item.title: Morning Minute: Soldier Arrested for $400K Polymarket Insider Bet on Maduro Raid
item.description: Trump says the whole world's a casino. Tether made its biggest enforcement freeze ever. And SBF drops his new trial bid.

item.title: Bitcoin is bullish. Our Vector framework has triggered a clear signal - Momentum: Consolidating above +0.5 triggers bullish, below -0.5 signals bearish. Today, we're at 1. - Risk: This momentum is accompanied by a completely reset Risk Index of 0. Check the - x.com

item.title: Aave Leads ‘DeFi United’ Push to Contain $292M KelpDAO Fallout
item.description: Aave's founder has pledged 5,000 ETH of his own money as a growing DeFi coalition races to contain the fallout from the KelpDAO exploit.

item.title: 🇨🇳 NEW: China has tightened its crypto crackdown, issuing new online marketing rules that again classify crypto promotion, issuance and trading as illegal financial activities. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5mQWJia2RwRjAwT2ZRNUdLR01jeW40bjM2NndkZjZYd3VRRlhUbGtqZ1RVSEpxOTVHeGprWFE5QlZpdDRNRkZ2WWZRU2FMZnBaQXVLR0Z5RzdyTTBBb1B2STczeUU?oc=5" target="_blank">🇨🇳 NEW: China has tightened i…

item.title: Bitcoin, dollar move in near-perfect opposition. It hasn't been this extreme in almost 4 years.
item.description: What you need to know for April 24, 2026
